basic_details.job_title: AIAHL Chief of Personnel and Administration Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: AI Assets Holding Limited (AIAHL) Chief of Personnel & Administration Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.aiahl.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIAHL Chief of Personnel & Administration Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 62 years of age who have MBA in Personnel/HR/IR or its equivalent Post Graduate Master’s Degree/Diploma with core subjects like Personnel Management/Human Resources/IR are eligible to apply for these Chief of Personnel & Administration vacancies. The offline application process for AIAHL Chief of Personnel & Administration R

qualification.education_qualification: MBA in Personnel/HR/IR or Post Graduate Masters Degree, Diploma, Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) )
qualification.details: MBA in Personnel/HR/IR or its equivalent Post Graduate Masters Degree (02 years course)/Diploma with core subjects like Personnel Management/Human Resources/IR. In addition, the candidate having legal qualification, Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) shall be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIAHL Chief of Personnel & Administration Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiahl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chief of Personnel & Administration post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Chief of Personnel & Administration position at AI Assets Holding Limited is 25th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Chief of Personnel & Administration role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief of Personnel & Administration post will receive a salary of Rs. 1,50,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA in Personnel/HR/IR or an equivalent Post Graduate Masters Degree (02 years course)/Diploma with core subjects like Personnel Management/Human Resources/IR. A Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply offline by sending their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification. Ensure it reaches before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the post of Chief of Personnel & Administration.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Personal Interview followed by a Pre-Employment Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Chief of Personnel & Administration post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of AI Assets Holding Limited, which is www.aiahl.in.
